preamble: The smoothing of the diphthong [ei] to a nasalized vowel [ẽ] occurs when the off-glide is absorbed into the preceding nasalized vowel, resulting in a monophthong.
sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Languages: A Historical Introduction. Cambridge University Press.
